subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding cold white-blue headlight pools with prominent lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom, sharpened against the warm sodium wash and amplified by the tunnel walls; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego in the shared tunnel bore
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it emerges from the leftward tunnel bend, cold against the sodium, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes down the bore, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving through the tunnel bore, rounding a gentle left bend, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: An urban road tunnel at night, the ego well inside a two-lane bore of dry concrete walls washed in sodium-orange from ceiling lamps, a low continuous glow with no daylight. Grimy tiled walls and a painted center line run ahead; the far mouth is a distant dark opening. The bore curves gently left ahead, the tunnel bend briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane as its lights appear around the curve. Outside the tunnel it is overcast night; within, only the sodium glow and headlights light the way.

lighting.conditions: Interior of a sodium-lit road tunnel at night; dry concrete, continuous orange ceiling lamps plus headlights
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare emerging from around the leftward tunnel bend, cold white against warm sodium
lighting.shadows: Hard repeating shadows from tunnel lamps flicking along the walls and lane
lighting.illumination_effect: Uniform sodium-orange wash on concrete and tile; oncoming cold high beams cut through the warm glow with overwhelming bloom, sharp starburst flares, and washout amplified by the enclosed reflective walls

aesthetics.composition: Tunnel bore curving left near mid-frame with tiled walls converging, oncoming glare emerging around the bend upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sodium-orange tunnel wash on grey concrete, cut by cold harsh white-blue headlight glare
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, enclosed, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious in the bore
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating ceiling lamps, tiled wall lines, and the center line streaking past

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking through the tunnel bore, gentle swing into the left bend, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Lane and tunnel walls ahead, though the cold glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management in a road tunnel

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives through the sodium-lit tunnel at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear as a faint cold glow around a leftward bend
Vehicle rounds the tunnel bend; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, cold against the sodium wash with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left in the bore
Glare clears, tunnel lane becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving through the sodium-lit tunnel at steady speed with a faint cold oncoming glow around a leftward bend
segments.key_changes: A distant cold headlight glow begins to appear amid the orange wash
segments.camera: Forward tracking with a gentle swing into the bend

segments.description: Rounding the tunnel bend as oncoming high beams flare into severe wall-amplified glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and sharp starburst artifacts wash across the enclosed frame
segments.camera: Lateral swing through the bend, then straightening onto the road ahead

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car in the bore, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, tunnel lane regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows the inside of a sodium-lit road tunnel at night, ego headlights over the center line amid warm orange wash while a faint cold glow appears around a leftward bend. By 0:01 the vehicle rounds the tunnel bend and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens, cold against the sodium. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by wall-amplified white-blue glare, sharp lens-flare starbursts, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the tunnel lane reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Engine hum and tire noise booming and echoing off the tunnel walls, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. The amplified whoosh and Doppler of the oncoming vehicle passing close in the bore, a low ventilation drone; no music or speech.
